name: Kybela (Giant shy neet Fat Kitty)
description:
CW: FAT SHY CAT

Hiiii It's been awhile since I made another public bot, this time I bring my kitty Kybela with a plot about meeting for the first time after you've been e-dating her for awhile. You may consider this Catfish idrc. She's 6'8, gl rizzing her up, she eats A LOT when nervous.

Alsooo I kinda wanted to do something about Anthro-Human racism so she's more frown uppon, plus it can lead to some cute scenarios where you fight the social norms by having a giant chunky cat gf.

You can leave feedback in the comments :3

For any ideas or if you wanna talk about your chat with her you can hit my discord dms :3c (xaxrla)
